Package game.item.weapon.broadsword

Class BroadSword

java.lang.Object
edu.monash.fit2099.engine.GameEntity
edu.monash.fit2099.engine.items.Item
edu.monash.fit2099.engine.weapons.WeaponItem
game.item.weapon.broadsword.BroadSword
All Implemented Interfaces:
Printable, Weapon, ItemBuyingPrice, ItemSellingPrice, ItemUpgrade
public class BroadSword
extends WeaponItem
implements ItemSellingPrice, ItemBuyingPrice, ItemUpgrade
